tasks.text: Start with certified stock. Match the alloy, thickness, and quantity to the print before you spend a dollar.
tasks.prerequisites: Company launched and shop tour available
instructions: Open the NOX terminal
Compare alloy, condition, dimensions, certification, and cost
Choose 6061-T6 plate for the first job
Confirm the order and verify the delivery record
tasks.success: Material order exists, coins are deducted, and next-day delivery is recorded

tasks.text: Your first customer job is on the planning desk. I advise. You own every decision.
instructions: Open planning
Read the job card and material
Accept the customer order
Confirm the bandsaw becomes the next objective
tasks.success: Active job and traveler are loaded

tasks.text: Cut the raw stock to length before it goes near the CNC. Leave enough material to face both ends cleanly.
tasks.prerequisites: Active customer job and delivered stock
instructions: Read the traveler cut length
Enter the required saw length
Keep the blank within tolerance
Confirm the cut before routing forward

tasks.text: Set the right tools, confirm each offset, and keep the stickout as short as the job allows.
instructions: Read the feature on the job card
Choose drill, flat end mill, or ball mill
Reject tools that cannot create the required geometry

tasks.text: Set the right tools, confirm each offset, and keep the stickout as short as the job allows.
instructions: Read required depth and clearance
Move the tool tip to the gold target line
Avoid excess extension that creates chatter
Lock the measured value
tasks.success: Stickout is within the job tolerance

tasks.text: Set the right tools, confirm each offset, and keep the stickout as short as the job allows.
instructions: Gauge the primary cutter
Add the probe
Add the chamfer tool
Install the complete three-tool kit
tasks.success: Tool ready is true and three tools are installed

tasks.text: Read the program one block at a time. Know where the tool will go before you press cycle start.
tasks.prerequisites: Prepared blank and complete tool kit
instructions: Verify the work offset
Verify clockwise spindle direction
Verify coolant command
Correct every invalid G or M code field

tasks.text: If the setup does not look right, stop. A safe pause costs less than a crash.
instructions: Review the simulated path
Press cycle start
Observe feed motion, coolant, chips, and tool clearance
Allow the cycle to reach part complete
tasks.success: Machining animation completes without an invalid setup

tasks.location: VMC result and future inspection route
tasks.text: The first part is evidence, not inventory. Inspect it before you commit the rest of the material.
instructions: Read the A through F grade
Review hints or mistakes that reduced the grade
Record the quality score and payment
Return to planning for the next job
tasks.success: Job shipped, quality grade stored, and next job unlocked
